posts.title: "@astro-minimax/ai Module Technical Architecture Deep Dive"
posts.summary: The article explains the vendor-agnostic architecture of the @astro-minimax/ai module, detailing its layered RAG pipeline, multi-provider failover, build-runtime separation, and graceful degradation to deliver low-latency, resilient blog AI interactions.
keyPoints: Supports global chat and article companion modes.
Uses SSE streaming and RAG for fast responses.
Retrieval pipeline combines TF-IDF and reranking.
Provider Manager enables failover and health tracking.
Build-time preprocessing reduces runtime latency.
Fallbacks cover provider, retrieval, and analysis failures.

posts.title: Settings Panel & Preferences
posts.summary: The article introduces astro-minimax’s settings panel, explaining how to adjust appearance, reading, layout, and general preferences, then save, share, reset, and automatically restore them for a personalized blog experience.
keyPoints: The panel opens from the bottom-right gear icon.
Preferences cover appearance, reading, layout, and UI toggles.
Reading options include theme, width, line height, and font family.
AI chat panel supports Small, Medium, and Large sizes.
Settings persist in localStorage and restore on revisit.
Share exports preferences as URL parameters; Reset restores defaults.

posts.title: "@astro-minimax/ai 模块技术架构详解"
posts.summary: 文章详解 @astro-minimax/ai 的分层技术架构，围绕 RAG 流水线、多供应商抽象、流式响应与降级容错设计展开，说明其如何在博客场景中实现低延迟、高可用且可扩展的 AI 交互能力。
keyPoints: 模块面向全局对话与阅读伴侣场景
采用 Streaming、SSE 与 RAG 组合
Provider Manager实现多供应商切换
检索链路含缓存、TF-IDF与可选重排
智能分析含关键词提取与引用守卫
三层提示构建提升复用与动态适配

posts.title: 设置面板与偏好设置
posts.summary: 文章介绍 astro-minimax 的设置面板使用方式，说明外观、阅读、布局与通用偏好的配置项，以及通过 localStorage 持久化和 URL 参数分享设置的实现效果。
keyPoints: 设置面板入口位于右下角齿轮图标
支持外观、阅读、布局和通用偏好
阅读配置覆盖字号、行高、宽度与字体
AI 聊天面板支持 S/M/L 三档宽度
设置可持久化到 localStorage 自动恢复
当前偏好可通过 URL 参数分享

posts.title: How to update dependencies of astro-minimax
posts.summary: The article explains how to update astro-minimax dependencies and template safely using pnpm, npm-check-updates, and Git workflows, helping users stay current while reducing breakage risk.
keyPoints: pnpm provides the fastest package update path.
npm-check-updates enables staged patch, minor, major upgrades.
Major version bumps require careful release note review.
Template users should preserve customized content and config files.
Git remote pull can sync upstream template changes.
Merge conflicts and unrelated histories are key update pitfalls.

posts.title: 如何更新 astro-minimax 的依赖
posts.summary: 文章介绍更新 astro-minimax 依赖与模板的实用流程：CLI 用户可直接用 pnpm 更新，模板用户可借助 npm-check-updates 分层升级并用 Git 合并模板，从而更稳妥地保持项目最新。
keyPoints: CLI 集成可直接用 pnpm 更新包
npm-check-updates 适合批量检查依赖
依赖升级应按 patch、minor、major 分层进行
模板更新需保留内容与配置目录
可通过 Git 远程拉取上游模板并解决冲突
主版本升级和模板合并后必须完整测试

posts.title: "Configuring Environment Variables in Cloudflare Pages"
posts.summary: This tutorial shows how to configure Cloudflare Pages environment variables for astro-minimax, including build-time and runtime settings, scope selection, and AI binding alignment, so deployment, AI chat, notifications, and builds work correctly.
keyPoints: Build-time variables need redeployment.
Runtime secret changes apply immediately.
Production and Preview scopes should be separated.
NODE_VERSION 22 is required for builds.
AI_BINDING_NAME must match wrangler binding.
Sensitive variables should be encrypted in dashboard.

posts.title: "Complete Setup Guide: From Zero to Production"
posts.summary: The article provides a step-by-step tutorial for creating an astro-minimax blog, configuring core features, and deploying it to Cloudflare and Vercel to enable comments, analytics, notifications, and AI chat for a production-ready setup.
keyPoints: Uses CLI to initialize and preview blog
Configures site metadata in src/config.ts
Deploys Astro site to Cloudflare Pages
Sets up Waline with Vercel and Neon PostgreSQL
Integrates Umami analytics via websiteId and script
Enables AI chat with build commands and Workers AI

posts.title: "Setup Umami Analytics: Free Vercel Deployment"
posts.summary: This tutorial explains how to deploy the privacy-friendly Umami analytics platform for free with Vercel and Neon, compares alternative hosting options, and outlines setup, initialization, and blog integration preparation via websiteId retrieval.
keyPoints: Umami offers cookie-free, GDPR-compliant analytics.
Vercel plus Neon is the recommended free deployment path.
Initial Vercel deployment may fail before database setup.
`DATABASE_URL` is the only required environment variable.
Docker deployment includes PostgreSQL, proxy, and backup setup.
Default admin password must be changed after first login.

posts.title: "Deploy Waline Comment System on Vercel"
posts.summary: The article explains how to deploy Waline on Vercel with a built-in Neon PostgreSQL database, configure required environment variables and optional email notifications, then connect it to an astro-minimax blog for a complete comment system.
keyPoints: Waline uses Vercel, Neon PostgreSQL, and blog client.
Database schema must be imported before use.
Waline supports both PG_* and POSTGRES_* vars.
PG_SSL must be enabled for Neon connection.
Deployment is verified by opening the welcome page.
Email notifications can be configured with Resend or SMTP.

posts.title: "Cloudflare Pages 环境变量配置指南"
posts.summary: 本文围绕 astro-minimax 在 Cloudflare Pages 部署时的环境变量配置，说明构建时与运行时变量的设置方法、必需与可选项及排障要点，以确保 AI、通知和站点功能正常启用。
keyPoints: 区分构建时与运行时环境变量
NODE_VERSION=22是构建必需项
AI_BINDING_NAME需与wrangler配置一致
变量保存后必须重新部署生效
通知与OpenAI兼容API均可按需配置
可通过日志定位AI与通知故障

posts.title: "从零开始：完整博客搭建指南"
posts.summary: 文章围绕 astro-minimax 博客，从项目初始化、站点配置到 Cloudflare 部署，并接入 Waline、Umami、Telegram 通知与 AI 聊天，帮助读者完成一套可用的完整博客系统。
keyPoints: 使用 CLI 初始化并本地预览博客
站点信息与功能在 config.ts 配置
Cloudflare Pages 需设置构建参数与 NODE_VERSION
Waline 与 Umami 均依赖 Vercel 和 Neon 数据库
AI 聊天需启用配置并执行数据构建命令
故障排查覆盖部署、评论、AI与通知问题
